sentences.arabic: رَأَى خَالِدٌ رَجُلًا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى مُسَاعَدَةٍ فِي الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Halid je u ulici vidio čovjeka koji treba pomoć.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid saw a man who needed help in the street.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَيْهِ وَسَأَلَهُ: هَلْ تَحْتَاجُ مُسَاعَدَةً؟
sentences.translation: Prišao mu je i pitao ga: Trebaš li pomoć?
sentences.translationEn: He went to him and asked: Do you need help?

sentences.translation: Pomogao mu je ponijeti tešku torbu.
sentences.translationEn: He helped him carry the heavy bag.

sentences.translation: Osjetio je sreću jer je učinio dobro.
sentences.translationEn: He felt happy because he did a good deed.
